questions.question: Name at least five of the eight members of the Brat Pack.
questions.answer: Molly Ringwald, Anthony Michael Hall, Andrew McCarthy, Rob Lowe, Emilio Estevez, Ally Sheedy, Judd Nelson, Demi Moore

questions.question: What popular 80's doll had adoption papers?
What was Annie Lennox walking on in a 1992 hit?
Who was the legendary, fedora-wearing coach of the Dallas Cowboys?
What did Casey Kasem encourage listeners to do at the end of each American Top 40 radio show?
questions.answer: "Keep your feet on the ground, and keep reaching for the stars."
